sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31138" key="ei)na/kis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰνάκις</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰνᾰκισχίλιοι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰνᾰκόσιοι</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">αι</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, α</foreign>, <sense id="n31138.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐνάκις</ref></xr>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
